description: This blue trinket of item level 115 goes in the "Trinket" slot. It is sold by Quartermaster Enuril. In the Trinkets category. Added in World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade.
name: Scryer's Bloodgem

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Scryer's Bloodgem Phase 1 Item Level 115 Binds when picked up Unique Trinket Requires Level 70 Requires The Scryers - Revered Equip: Improves spell hit rating by 32. Use: Increases spell damage by up to 150 and healing by up to 280 for 15 sec. (1 Min, 30 Sec Cooldown) Sell Price: 4 39 88 This blue trinket of item level 115 goes in the "Trinket" slot.
